description: The Cesarano clan is a Camorra clan based in Castellammare di Stabia, Italy, founded in the 1980s by Ferdinando Cesarano. It operates in the Ponte Persica region and Pompei, engaging in extortion, racketeering, usury, and drug trafficking. The clan has been led by Nicola Esposito and currently by Luigi Di Martino. Ferdinando Cesarano was sentenced to life imprisonment in 2000.
